title: Total Functions, Result Values, and Pattern Matching · Transformation Lens: Exception Boundary
summary: Make a batch import explain every rejected record rather than aborting or returning ambiguous sentinels. Planned artifact: Add and verify the fp exception boundary increment in a typed parse-validate-result pipeline. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Convert expected domain failures to values while preserving unexpected exceptions and tracebacks.
Choose fail-fast or error accumulation from stakeholder correction needs.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
